---
title: Costs and Getting Access
---

## How to get access

Access to Pure is automatically provided to all VU Amsterdam researchers and PhD candidates. Please note that certain VU functions can have a research component to their workload, but if this is not a standard requirement, a Pure account is not automatically created. In such cases, department heads can [request](https://services.vu.nl/esc?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=b000b90f478aa110bfa46d72e36d4303) a Pure account and profile to be created for specific VU employees who create research output. 

## Are there costs involved?

Pure is provided free of charge to all VU Amsterdam researchers as part of the university’s research data management services.
